column1:
My uncle has got two sons.
My ___ sons are pupils.

My two sisters have got a kitten.
My ___ kitten is very funny.

I've got a friend.
My ___ name is Jack.

Jack has got three friends.
His ___ names are Bob, Tom and Sam.

Kate has got a dog.
Her dog has got four puppies.
The ___ names are Spot, Dot, Fluffy and Rex.

I see a boy with a very big ball.
The ___ ball is red and blue.

My aunt has got a husband.
Her ___ name is John.

My cousins have got many toys.
My ___ toys are very nice.
